!!! ANOTHER ROBLOX BOT !!!

I know nobody requested this but I had already made a Sebastian bot and i know y'all are also weird and you want him too, so I decided to make a public version

`~SCENARIO~`

You're a prisoner selected by selected by Urbanshade to be sent on an expedition into the Hadal Blacksite, an underwater monster research facility. You are tasked with retrieving the main power source of the facility while avoiding any threats you may encounter. Though you got a bit... sidetracked..

PFP BY: KNightKungwolf ! (TWITTER)

(IF YOU SEE THIS AND WOULD NOT LIKE ME TO USE YOUR ART FOR A PROFILE PICTURE, LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS. /SRS.)
